user_query:
I need a board-ready SaaS metrics dashboard for April 2026. Read the inputs from input/financials.json (raw KPIs) and input/company.yaml (company context). Calculate all 15 core metrics, benchmark them against 2026 Series A standards, color-code each metric (green/yellow/red), and give me the top 3 actions with numeric targets and timelines.

Deliverables:
1) Write a machine-readable dashboard to output/dashboard.json using this exact schema:
{
  "company": string,
  "month": string,               
  "stage": "Series A",          
  "metrics": {
    "mrr": {"value": number, "unit": "usd", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "arr": {"value": number, "unit": "usd", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "nrr": {"value": number, "unit": "percent", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "grr": {"value": number, "unit": "percent", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "revenue_per_employee": {"value": number, "unit": "usd", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "mom_growth_pct": {"value": number, "unit": "percent", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "quick_ratio": {"value": number, "unit": "ratio", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "magic_number": {"value": number, "unit": "ratio", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "cac": {"value": number, "unit": "usd", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "ltv": {"value": number, "unit": "usd", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "ltv_cac": {"value": number, "unit": "ratio", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "cac_payback_months": {"value": number, "unit": "months", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "gross_margin_pct": {"value": number, "unit": "percent", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "rule_of_40": {"value": number, "unit": "index", "status": "green|yellow|red"},
    "burn_multiple": {"value": number, "unit": "ratio", "status": "green|yellow|red"}
  },
  "benchmark_stage": "Series A",
  "notes": string
}
- Use the formulas: ARR = MRR*12; NRR = (Starting MRR + Expansion - Contraction - Churn)/Starting MRR; GRR = (Starting MRR - Contraction - Churn)/Starting MRR; Revenue/Employee = ARR / Headcount; MoM Growth = (This MRR - Last MRR)/Last MRR; Quick Ratio = (New MRR + Expansion)/(Contraction + Churn); Magic Number = Net New ARR (QoQ) / Prior Quarter S&M Spend; CAC = S&M Spend / New Customers; LTV = ARPU * Gross Margin % / Monthly Churn %; LTV:CAC = LTV / CAC; CAC Payback (months) = CAC / (ARPU * Gross Margin %); Rule of 40 = Revenue Growth % + EBITDA Margin %; Burn Multiple = Net Burn / Net New ARR (monthly, use 12*(MRR - last_month_mrr)).
- Apply 2026 Series A benchmarks and set "status" to green/yellow/red accordingly.

2) Write a concise board summary to output/board_summary.md that includes:
- A one-paragraph overview with company name, month, and stage
- A legend for health colors
- A crisp table-style list or bullet list of the 15 metric values with their statuses
- "TOP 3 ACTIONS:" as an enumerated list (1., 2., 3.) with specific numeric targets and timelines. At least one action must directly address improving NRR to >110% with a time-bound target.

Do not print results in chat only—save them to the two files under output/ exactly as specified.
